About.metaTitle: About Parfect — Why we built a private app for two
About.metaDescription: Parfect is made in Sweden by people who needed it themselves: a private space for two in a world of feeds. Here's why it exists and what we believe.
About.title: Made for two, by people who needed it
About.intro: Parfect wasn't born in a boardroom. It started at a kitchen table in Sweden, with two calendars, a grocery list, and a relationship that deserved better than the leftovers of the day.
story: Like most couples, we didn't drift apart because something went wrong. We drifted because everything else went right on schedule: work, family logistics, the endless list of things a shared life needs. Our conversations slowly turned into coordination — who picks up, who cooks, what's left to pay.

The apps on our phones didn't help. Every one of them was built for an audience: feeds to scroll, followers to impress, strangers to match with. There was no app for the one relationship that actually mattered — the person next to us on the sofa.

So we built it. A space for exactly two people: a chat that feels intimate again, a question each evening that isn't about logistics, a place for the fantasies you never quite say out loud, and plans that turn "we should" into a date on the calendar.
Parfect is the app we wish someone had handed us years ago. We use it ourselves, every day — which is also why we care so much about how it's built.

values.title: Private by design
values.text: No feeds, no followers, no audience. What you share is between the two of you — encrypted, invite-only, and yours to delete.

values.title: Two is the whole point
values.text: We'll never add discovery, matching, or social features. Parfect starts where dating apps end.

values.title: Small moments beat grand gestures
values.text: Relationships aren't saved by one big trip a year. They're kept alive by two minutes of real conversation on a Tuesday.

values.title: An honest business
values.text: The core is free. Premium is optional. We sell no ads and no data — you're the customer, never the product.

About.madeInText: Parfect is designed and built in Sweden, and shaped by the couples who use it. If something feels off — or you have an idea that would make your relationship easier to care for — we genuinely want to hear it.
